summary: Iteration 8: CBCT File Upload/Download feature testing completed - 21/21 tests passed (100%). All 9 requested CBCT features verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: CBCT upload endpoint correctly validates: (1) only students can upload, (2) only procedure owner can upload, (3) file extension validation (.pdf, .png, .jpg, .jpeg, .heif, .heic), (4) 25MB size limit
CBCT download endpoint correctly checks authorization: students (own procedure), assigned supervisors, and implant_incharge/administrator can access
Files are stored with UUID names in /app/backend/uploads/ with original filename preserved in DB
Procedure detail returns cbct_file and cbct_original_name fields after upload
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created with TEST_ prefix (e.g., TEST_CBCT_Patient, TEST_Workflow_Patient) and cleaned up after each test class
context_for_next_testing_agent: CBCT upload/download feature fully tested. Upload endpoint at POST /api/procedures/{id}/upload-cbct, download at GET /api/uploads/{filename}. Note: shruti.k@student.dental.edu credential from requirements is INVALID - use atharva.mahadik@student.dental.edu instead. Full workflow (create->phase1 approve->phase2 submit->phase2 approve) still works correctly.

tested_features.11_upload_implant_incharge_403: PASS - Implant incharge gets 403 on upload
tested_features.12_upload_different_student_403: PASS - Different student gets 403 on upload
tested_features.13_upload_nonexistent_procedure_404: PASS - Upload to nonexistent procedure returns 404
tested_features.14_procedure_has_cbct_fields: PASS - Procedure detail includes cbct_file and cbct_original_name
tested_features.18_download_different_student_403: PASS - Different student gets 403 on download

notes: All 9 CBCT features from requirements verified: (1) PDF upload success, (2) invalid extension rejection, (3) owning student upload, (4) non-student 403, (5) authorized download, (6) unauthorized download 403, (7) nonexistent file 404, (8) procedure detail includes cbct fields, (9) full workflow still works
